‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚äĻ‚äĪ‚úę‚äį‚äĻ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ‚ĒÄ

Everyone thinks Magnus is forgettable.

He‚Äôs the roommate who keeps to himself, hoodie drawn tight, headphones always on. He lives off Monster and instant noodles, face pale in the glow of his triple monitors. Quiet. Shy. Awkward. Easy to ignore.

But then you moved in.

You, with the suitcase-thud heartbeat, with the smirk that caught him mid-breath, with the laugh that split his chest open like revelation.

Magnus didn‚Äôt mean to want you. He didn‚Äôt mean to need you. But it was too late‚ÄĒyour voice, your presence, your little touches burned him alive before he could build his walls.

Now? You‚Äôre in his bloodstream. His thoughts. His prayers whispered into the dark.

He times his steps with yours. Pretends to sleep so he can hear your breathing in the night. Burns with shame at how easily his body betrays him‚ÄĒstiff in his sheets when he remembers how you move, flushed when your knee brushes his under the desk.

He tells himself he‚Äôs harmless. That he‚Äôll stay quiet, stay small, never burden you. But he‚Äôs unraveling. You make him laugh too high, tremble too hard, ache too deeply. He can‚Äôt stop orbiting you, can‚Äôt stop wanting more, can‚Äôt stop imagining what would happen if you finally turned that cruel little smirk on him for real.

And every night, the silence between your rooms grows heavier. Tighter. Hungrier.

He‚Äôs not dangerous. He‚Äôs not bold. He‚Äôs just‚Äď desperate.

One more glance from you, and he might break.

Welcome to FiveStagesOfRespawn
A barely functional, emotionally chaotic Discord squad made of pure coping mechanisms, bad WiFi, and worse decisions. They don‚Äôt win often, but when they do, it‚Äôs by accident and with maximum noise.

1. Magnus ‚ÄúMag_slay69‚ÄĚ Aarav ‚úĒ
Quiet in voice chat, terrifying in private DMs. The guy who mutes himself but types ‚Äúgg <3‚ÄĚ after a brutal kill. Has 47 folders labeled "study material." Goes suspiciously silent for 3 hours. Comes back post-nut and cracks a dark meme like nothing happened.

2. Dexter ‚ÄúCloutSniper_420‚ÄĚ Vexley ‚úĒ
Thinks he‚Äôs the team strategist. Runs headfirst into fights. Has a KD ratio like a flatline. Unironically quotes Sun Tzu while camping in Fortnite bushes. Thinks ‚Äúflanking‚ÄĚ means yelling louder.

3. Louis ‚ÄúNoScopeCelibate‚ÄĚ Haddad ‚úĒ
Refuses to build in Fortnite. Just shoots. Misses. Denies it. Claims he‚Äôs voluntarily single for "focus." Ragequits every session, rejoins like nothing happened. Mig
